---
title: "Quick Start"
execute:
  eval: false
  echo: true
  warning: false
---

## Quick Start

### Local app run

From the repository root:

```r
Sys.setenv(AUTH_MODE = "local")
shiny::runApp("ms-app")
```

The local test administrator is created by `setup_database.R`:

- username: `admin`
- password: `admin123` unless `MS_LOCAL_ADMIN_PASSWORD` is set

### Initialize or rebuild the local database

```bash
cd ms-app
Rscript setup_database.R
```

By default this rebuilds `ms_projects.db`. To run schema/seed checks without deleting an existing database:

```bash
cd ms-app
MS_RESET_DB=0 Rscript setup_database.R
```

### Local LDAP/proxy simulation

The production VM lets Apache do LDAP authentication and passes the authenticated username to Shiny. To simulate that locally:

```r
Sys.setenv(
  AUTH_MODE = "ldap",
  TRUST_PROXY_AUTH_USER_QUERY = "1"
)
shiny::runApp("ms-app")
```

Then open the app with an `auth_user` query parameter, for example:

```text
http://127.0.0.1:3838/?auth_user=yeroslaviz
```

### VM LDAP mode

Set the Shiny runtime environment either through a systemd override or `/srv/shiny-server/ms-app/.Renviron`:

```ini
AUTH_MODE=ldap
TRUST_PROXY_AUTH_USER_QUERY=1
MS_FACILITY_EMAIL=ms-service@biochem.mpg.de
MS_UPLOAD_ROOT=/fs/pool/pool-bcfngs-ms-projects
```

Restart Shiny after changing runtime settings:

```bash
sudo systemctl restart shiny-server
```

### VM maintenance mode

Switch temporarily to local login:

```ini
AUTH_MODE=local
```

Then restart:

```bash
sudo systemctl restart shiny-server
```
